title: A.O. Smith Corporation (AOS) CEO Kevin Wheeler on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: A.O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 28, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Helen Gurholt - VP, Financial Planning and Analysis Kevin Wheeler - Chairman, President & CEO Charles Lauber - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Matt Summerville - D.A. Davidson Scott Graham - Loop Capital Markets Susan Maklari - Goldman Sachs Nathan Jones - Stifel Andy Kaplowitz - Citigroup Damian Karas - UBS David MacGregor - Longbow Research Operator Good day and thank you for standing by.

title: Why A O Smith Shares Are Sliding Today
text: A O Smith Corp (NYSE: AOS) reported first-quarter FY22 sales growth of 27% year-over-year to $978 million, beating the consensus of $967.05 million. Adjusted EPS improved 31% Y/Y to $0.77, beating the consensus of $0.75.

title: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q1 Earnings & Revenues Top Estimates
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) first-quarter 2022 revenues increase 27% year over year on account of impressive performance across its segments.

title: A.O. Smith (AOS) Flat As Market Sinks: What You Should Know
text: A.O. Smith (AOS) closed at $66.30 in the latest trading session, marking no change from the prior day.

title: A.O. Smith (AOS) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
text: A.O. Smith (AOS) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: 3 DRIP Stocks for Dividend Growth Investors
text: A.O. Smith, Hormel and S&P Global are three examples of DRIP stocks with long track records of dividend growth that provide ways for investors to build positions in their respective businesses. The post 3 DRIP Stocks for Dividend Growth Investors appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: A. O. Smith to Hold First Quarter Conference Call on April 28, 2022
text: MILWAUKEE , April 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE: AOS) will release its first quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, April 28, and has scheduled an investor conference call to follow at 10:00 a.m.

title: A. O. Smith: A High-Growth Dividend Aristocrat
text: A. O. Smith is one of America's largest producers and sellers of boilers and related home & construction products.
